question_text: What does efficiency mean in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: How much energy is wasted as heat

options.label: B
options.text: How much of the total energy input is converted into useful energy output

options.label: C
options.text: The total amount of energy used by a device

options.label: D
options.text: How fast a device uses up its energy

explanation: Efficiency measures what fraction of the total energy input becomes useful output. The rest is wasted, often as heat. A more efficient device wastes less energy.
